title: Accordion Component
description: Expandable sections for progressive disclosure of content.

title: Calendar Component
description: Date-time picker with validators, i18n direction support, and event-driven selection.

title: Chart Component
description: Line, area, bar, pie, and doughnut charts with declarative data and programmatic updates.

title: Data Table Component
description: Tabular data rendering with sorting and filtering behavior.

title: Data Grid Component
description: Grid-driven data layout with row and cell-level interactions.

title: Dialog Component
description: Accessible modal dialog and confirm workflows.

title: Drawer Component
description: Slide-in panel for secondary actions and contextual tools.

title: Dropdown Component
description: Selectable list with local and remote options.

title: Menubar Component
description: Hierarchical navigation menu with keyboard support.

title: Search Component
description: Typeahead suggestions plus result list rendering.

title: Stats Card Component
description: KPI card with trend indicator, animated value updates, and compact sparkline.

title: Tabs Component
description: Content switching with optional lazy loading.

title: Toast Component
description: Transient notifications with severity and timeout.

title: Tree Component
description: Nested node explorer with lazy branch expansion.

title: Wizard Component
description: Step-driven workflows with inline and page navigation modes.
